top_signals.title: Citadel Securities Says Fed Must Pivot to Inflation Fighting
top_signals.summary: The Federal Reserve should shift closer toward hiking interest rates as rising consumer prices become the dominant threat to the economy, according to Citadel Securities.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Americans are 'entrenched' in financial stress amid debt and price pressures
top_signals.summary: Inflation and high debt levels continue cause financial anxiety for many Americans. Nonprofits can help with debt mangement.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Chipmaker ETF rides AI excitement to quickest $10bn valuation on record
top_signals.summary: Roundhill Memory ETF, known as DRAM, surges 87% within 50 days of April launch
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Coinbase-incubated Base blockchain rolls out MCP gateway to AI interfaces like Claude, ChatGPT
top_signals.summary: With the integration, users will now be able to use natural language prompts to swap tokens, transfer funds, and interact with Base apps.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
